title: Test Suite Dataset Manifest
description: Machine-readable manifest for a single dataset in the test suite benchmark. Encodes the ten inclusion criteria as required structure. The manifest is the dataset's source of record — every revision is a Git commit.

schema_version.description: Semver of the test suite manifest schema (not the dataset version)

snapshot_date.description: ISO-8601 date when WE pulled the data — distinct from source version

host_type.description: Stable identifier for the source host

stability.description: stable=frozen release; churning=periodic re-releases; live-updating=continuously appended; closed-after-period=was live, now frozen

regime.description: Physical storage regime. Determines what gets materialized (traces.parquet, edges.parquet, metadata-only, Zarr-native)

primary.description: natural=real measurement (admissible as primary data); simulator=physics/process-model output (claims conditional on the simulator's structural assumptions); synthetic=constructed shift (methodological probe only, never primary evidence); mixed=blend

blend.description: Free-text describing the mixing when primary=mixed (e.g., 'real objects + simulated photometry', 'reanalysis = observation + assimilation model')

asymmetry_profile.description: 0=absent, 1=weak, 2=structurally important, 3=dominant. See schemas/asymmetry_profile.md for the full scoring guide.

field.description: Column/field name in the data, if applicable

pair_with.description: Sibling dataset names that complete a pair. Undirected; direction lives in pair.ood_protocol

entities.description: Entity count from authoritative source (paper/dataset card); null if not pinned

events.description: Null until verified by scripts/validate (counts rows in traces.parquet for event-regime; edges for KG; images for blob; N/A for array)

raw_bytes.description: Null until materialized; populated by scripts/validate from raw/ directory listing

n_env_levels.description: Null when env-cardinality is undefined pre-materialization (e.g., GHCN station × era cross-product)

schema.description: Regime-dependent payload structure. For event: entity_types/event_types/static_attributes. For KG: node_types/edge_types. For blob: metadata fields. For array: dimensions/variables.

facts.description: Established anchor facts about the dataset. Keep short.

hypotheses.description: Testable, declarative claims the dataset specifically enables

intuitions.description: Declarative expectations about likely-existing external work not yet incorporated

unknowns.description: What cannot yet be determined, or is not yet represented in the schema

boundary.description: One-line statement of what this dataset cannot evidence — its distinctive contribution to the benchmark's coverage

representational_commitments.description: Modeling choices baked into the data and invisible from inside it (catchment partition, paper-as-atom, etc.)

curation_provenance.description: For curated suites (WILDS, GOOD, DrugOOD, TDC): the curator's choices

derived_from.description: Underlying-data overlap (e.g., TDC and DrugOOD both derive from ChEMBL); prevents double-counting evidence

member_of.description: Pairs and/or suites this dataset belongs to

checksums.description: Relative path → sha256 hash. Empty until materialized; populated by scripts/validate.
